---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a workflow, validator, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What user workflow should this enable?

## Earth Engine datasets/operators involved

## Expected plan/preflight behavior

Should this stop at plan/render/validate, or should it eventually support live preflight/export?

## Safety and credential considerations

## Tests or evaluation cases

List offline tests first. If asking for live support, describe the required recipe-specific adapter, preflight evidence, explicit `--confirm-live` gate, and monitored task/output evidence.

## Capability Claim

- [ ] Plan/render/validate-ready only
- [ ] Live preflight requested
- [ ] Live export requested

Non-golden recipes may start with generic preflight gates, but they should stay out of live export claims until implemented and verified.
